title: Replace partner logos section with combined image on light background

requirements.text: Generate a version of the uploaded logos image (containing Smartway Wellness, AquaLab, Smart Laboratories, Cipla, and Laborate Pharmaceuticals India Ltd.) with a clean white or light neutral background instead of the dark/black background, preserving all logos at full visibility.
acceptanceCriteria: The logos image displayed on the page does not have a black or dark background
All 5 logos (Smartway Wellness, AquaLab, Smart Laboratories, Cipla, Laborate Pharmaceuticals) are clearly visible
The image background is white or a light neutral tone

requirements.text: In the pharmaceutical partners section of App.tsx, replace any existing individual logo elements or dark-background image with the new light-background combined logos image saved as a static asset in frontend/public/assets/generated/. Display it in a compact, space-efficient layout with a light/white section background.

quotes: Use this image and replace it to all logs use low space for it

acceptanceCriteria: The partners/logos section background is light (white or soft neutral), not black or dark
The combined logos image is rendered from frontend/public/assets/generated/
The section is compact and does not take excessive vertical space
No individual logo components remain; the single combined image replaces them all

constraints: Do not use a black or dark background for the logos section
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/main.tsx
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
nonGoals: Adding new pages or sections beyond the existing site
Changing the overall site color theme or typography

edits: Replace the dark/black background with a clean white or light neutral background, keeping all five logos (Smartway Wellness, AquaLab, Smart Laboratories, Cipla, Laborate Pharmaceuticals India Ltd.) fully visible and well-spaced (file_000000009d34720693b8df539e35b6e1.png > partner-logos-light.dim_1320x860.png)
